mapper.sql: id, type, grouping_id, binding_id, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
select
from w_power_binding where binding_id = #{adminId,jdbcType=INTEGER} and type = 0
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into w_power_binding (type, grouping_id, binding_id, create_time, update_time) values (#{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{groupingId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{bindingId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into w_power_binding
type,
grouping_id,
binding_id,
create_time,
update_time,

mapper.update:
update w_power_binding
type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
grouping_id = #{groupingId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
binding_id = #{bindingId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update w_power_binding set type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, grouping_id = #{groupingId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, binding_id = #{bindingId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
